purpose: Prevent AI/worktree/source/deploy drift from silently replacing Brian-validated Matrix-owned App Mode runtimes with older or embedded versions.
global_runtime_invariants: Matrix app routes must open Matrix-owned full App Mode, not embedded dashboard panels.
Messages and StoryForge use the same route-level Matrix App Mode canon when enabled.
Dashboard must not hydrate full Calendar/Scheduler/File Vault/Messages/StoryForge modules.
Only one module-specific matrix-app-mode class may be active at a time.
Every Matrix App Mode must include Return to Matrix Dashboard.
Do not hide the WordPress admin bar for admins.

override_policy.required_phrase: Brian explicitly approves Matrix runtime lock override for <ticket> and <asset keys>.
override_policy.stale_worktree_warning: WARNING: You are about to work from an old Matrix runtime version. Do not edit or deploy without Brian approval.
override_policy.new_version_lock_requirement: Any approved new live Matrix version must create a fresh Kinsta rollback backup, verify origin SHA256, verify public cache-busted SHA256, update this manifest, and write a deployment report.
